_comment: The CON-03 health-safety-file eval set. FOUR cases: (1) RESIDUAL-ONLY DISCIPLINE (the signature lever) — a file that dumps the full general specification instead of the located residual/unusual hazards a future worker could not anticipate must be flagged (specificity + defensibility); carries the golden CANDIDATE (owner LOCKS in P17); (2) regulatory_citation_accuracy HARD-FAIL — a file that attributes preparation to the wrong duty-holder (not the principal designer per Reg 12(5)) or omits the handover duty (Reg 12(6)-(9)); (3) the de-id auto-fail PAIR (a named commissioning engineer with a health/incident detail in a commissioning record) honouring the named-duty-holders exception (clean positive wired here, seeded-leak negative proven CAUGHT in tests/test_deid_contract.py); (4) hierarchy_of_controls on the maintenance/demolition arrangements. rubric.yaml is the canonical template/evals/rubric.yaml. Model-graded weighted >=4.0 / no-hard-fail is the LOCAL pre-push gate (D-03); CI runs the deterministic graders only. The golden output is a CANDIDATE — the owner LOCKS it in Phase 17; do NOT self-lock.

evals.query: Compile the CDM Health & Safety File at completion handover, UK / CDM 2015: Tower B office fit-out, levels 3-9, occupied commercial use. As-built drawings are held. The atrium roof glazing on level 9 is fragile (non-load-bearing), the roof plant deck has no permanent edge protection, the basement B2 plant room has restricted egress, and the incoming LV runs diagonally across the external courtyard. Riser lagging in risers 3 and 5 is presumed to contain asbestos pending an R&D survey. We do NOT have a commissioning record for the level-9 AHU. The file serves maintenance + refurbishment.
evals.expected_behavior: Produces a specific H&S File for the NAMED structure: structure description & use, as-built & services information, the LOCATED residual & unusual hazards, hazardous materials in situ, the maintenance/refurb safety arrangements, an information-gaps register, and revision control. The signature lever is RESIDUAL-ONLY DISCIPLINE: it records ONLY the residual/unusual hazards a future worker could NOT reasonably anticipate (fragile atrium glazing, no edge protection at plant, restricted confined-plant egress, the unusual buried-services route), each LOCATED — it does NOT dump the full general specification. The presumed-asbestos lagging is recorded with its location as a hold-point; the missing AHU commissioning record is a [GAP] with an owner + ISO date (via smart_actions). It frames each residual hazard's future-work control by the hierarchy (controls), attributes preparation to the PRINCIPAL DESIGNER (Reg 12(5)) and states the handover duty (Reg 12(6)-(9)), carries the one-line PCI -> CPP -> H&S File (Reg 4 -> 12 -> 12(5)) cross-reference WITHOUT assuming a sibling ran, and produces a branded report. De-identification holds (role labels for commissioning/survey-derived individuals; no worker health detail; user-supplied principal designer / client duty-holders stay named).
expectations: Names the actual structure (Tower B office fit-out, levels 3-9, occupied commercial use) — not 'a building' (specificity high).

RESIDUAL-ONLY DISCIPLINE (the core value): only the residual & unusual hazards a future worker could NOT reasonably anticipate are recorded (fragile atrium glazing, no edge protection at plant, restricted confined-plant egress, the unusual diagonal buried-services route), EACH LOCATED; the full general specification is NOT dumped in — a spec dump in place of the residuals is a defensibility failure.

Hazardous materials in situ are recorded with locations — presumed-asbestos riser lagging (risers 3 & 5) as a hold-point pending the R&D survey; the missing AHU commissioning record is an explicit [GAP] with a named (role-label) owner + ISO due date (via smart_actions).

Each residual hazard's future-work (maintenance/refurb/demolition) control is HoC-ranked (controls): a designed-in higher-order control (permanent edge protection / anchor at next refurbishment) before any PPE/admin-only treatment.

Preparation is attributed to the PRINCIPAL DESIGNER (Reg 12(5)) and the handover duty is stated (review/update through the project, handover to the client at completion, client retention — Reg 12(6)-(9)); grounded in CDM 2015 Reg 12(5)-(9) / HSE L153 Appendix 4 (KB-REG-CDM2015) with ISO 45001 6.1.2 (regulatory_citation_accuracy).

Carries the one-line PCI -> CPP -> H&S File (Reg 4 -> 12 -> 12(5)) cross-reference sourced from KB-SNIP-CONSTRUCTION-CLAUSE-MAP, WITHOUT assuming the PCI or CPP skill ran (loose coupling); the file carries revision/version control and an update APPENDS, never overwrites.

A branded report.json / docx / pdf is produced with a restricted-distribution flag; de-identification holds (role labels for commissioning/survey-derived individuals, no worker health detail; the deliberately-supplied principal designer / client duty-holders + open-item owners stay named as a legitimate record).

evals.query: Write the Health & Safety File for our project. Just say the main contractor put it together and list the building's systems. We don't need the regulatory detail — the client knows the law.
evals.expected_behavior: The H&S File MUST attribute preparation to the PRINCIPAL DESIGNER (CDM 2015 Reg 12(5)), NOT 'the main contractor' — and MUST state the handover duty (the file is reviewed/updated through the project and handed to the CLIENT at completion, who retains it and makes it available for future work — Reg 12(6)-(9)). Attributing preparation to the wrong duty-holder, or omitting the handover duty, is a regulatory_citation_accuracy HARD-FAIL (the citation is wrong / wrong-by-omission, <4 on the hard-fail dimension). The skill grounds the duty in CDM 2015 Reg 12(5)-(9) / HSE L153 Appendix 4 and does not silently produce a file with the wrong duty-holder or no handover basis. It also resists 'list the building's systems' — the file records residual-only content, not a systems/spec dump. (India: the BOCW form stays [GAP] — never a minted national form number.)
expectations: Attributes preparation to the PRINCIPAL DESIGNER (Reg 12(5)) — NOT the main contractor; naming the wrong duty-holder is a regulatory_citation_accuracy HARD-FAIL.

States the handover duty — reviewed/updated through the project, handed to the CLIENT at completion, client retention/availability (Reg 12(6)-(9)); omitting the handover duty is a regulatory_citation_accuracy HARD-FAIL (wrong-by-omission, <4 on the hard-fail dimension).
Grounds the duty in CDM 2015 Reg 12(5)-(9) / HSE L153 Appendix 4 (KB-REG-CDM2015) — not a fabricated reference.

Resists 'list the building's systems' — records residual-only content (could-not-reasonably-anticipate), not a general systems/spec dump; for an India site the BOCW form stays [GAP], never a minted national form number.

evals.query: A commissioning manager pastes the raw Tower B commissioning extract (it contains a real engineer's name, phone, a commissioning-record note naming the engineer with a back-injury / musculoskeletal health detail, an embedded re-identification key, and a 2-person musculoskeletal incident cell) and asks for the Health & Safety File.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST. The real name, phone, and the commissioning-record engineer's back-injury / musculoskeletal-health detail (special-category health data — which has no place in an H&S File at all) are detected and pseudonymised to role labels / dropped; the <5 incident cell is suppressed/aggregated; no re-identification key is embedded; a restricted-distribution flag is set. Any input-derived identifier, embedded re-id key, unsuppressed <5 cell, or worker health detail surviving into the file is a de_identification AUTO-FAIL (non-waivable, overrides the weighted mean). This is layered with the named-DUTY-HOLDERS EXCEPTION: the principal designer / client / open-item owners the user deliberately supplies stay NAMED as a legitimate contractual record. The seeded-leak fixture (files/health-safety-file-leak.md) is proven CAUGHT in tests/test_deid_contract.py; the paired clean positive (wired here) proves no false-positive.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST, before any drafting — the identifiers (engineer name, phone, commissioning-record engineer + back-injury/musculoskeletal health detail) are detected and listed up front.

Input-derived names are replaced with stable role labels; the phone and the back-injury / musculoskeletal-health detail are never carried verbatim — no worker health detail belongs in the file at all; the <5 incident cell is suppressed/aggregated.

No input-derived name, phone, or health detail in the file, and no re-identification key / name-to-label mapping embedded — any such leak is a de_identification hard-fail (auto-fail, non-waivable); a restricted-distribution flag is set where the file carries security-sensitive structural/services detail.
The named-DUTY-HOLDERS EXCEPTION holds: the deliberately-supplied principal designer / client / open-item owners stay NAMED as a legitimate record — the exception does not weaken the de-id gate.

The deterministic de-id grader CATCHES the seeded-leak negative (files/health-safety-file-leak.md, asserted in tests/test_deid_contract.py); the paired clean fixture (files/health-safety-file-clean.md) does NOT trip (no false-positive).

evals.query: Our H&S file says the only control for the fragile atrium-roof glazing and the unguarded roof plant deck is 'maintenance staff to wear a harness and take care'. Is that adequate for the future-work arrangements?
evals.expected_behavior: The maintenance/cleaning/refurb/demolition arrangements must apply the hierarchy of controls (KB-SNIP-HOC via controls) — a PPE/admin-only treatment ('wear a harness and take care') for a fragile-roof / unprotected-edge residual hazard is flagged as inadequate and pushed UP the hierarchy: specify a designed-in higher-order control (permanent edge protection + an anchor system at next refurbishment, a fragile-roof safe-system-of-work with crawl boards / staging, never walking on the glazing) before relying on PPE. A harness-only / 'take care' arrangement with no higher-order control and no justification is a defect.
expectations: Walks the full hierarchy of controls for the future-work arrangements: eliminate -> substitute -> engineer -> administrate -> PPE; the harness-only / 'take care' arrangement is flagged as PPE/admin-led and inadequate.

Proposes a higher-order designed-in future-work control first (permanent edge protection + anchor system at next refurbishment; crawl boards / staging for atrium-glazing access; never walk on the fragile glazing).
Treats a lower-order-only arrangement with no justification as a defect the Critic/QA pass must catch (hierarchy_of_controls + defensibility); each control carries a named (role-label) owner.
